pi_items.source: Cross-verified in task.json description (line 5), setup_task.sh (line 10), export_result.sh (line 11), and verifier.py (line 54)
Task description explicitly states: 'add two specific friends... 'Captain UAL''. Verifier.py validates inclusion of 'captain ual' (case-insensitive match at line 96)
Task description explicitly states: 'Captain UAL' (Airline: United). Verifier.py checks for 'united' in airline field (line 99)

Task description states 'create a JSON file... containing ONLY the friends associated with United Airlines'. Verifier.py awards points for including Captain UAL (lines 105-106). Final pass condition requires found_ual=true (line 158)
Task description explicitly states: 'add two specific friends... 'Captain DAL''. Verifier.py validates exclusion of 'captain dal' (case-insensitive match at line 115)
Task description explicitly states: 'Captain DAL' (Airline: Delta). Task requirement: 'Exclude any friends from other airlines' (Delta is not United)

Task description states 'containing ONLY the friends associated with United Airlines. Exclude any friends from other airlines'. Verifier.py awards points for NOT including Captain DAL (lines 119-121). Final pass condition requires found_dal=false (line 158)

privileged_info_summary: This task creates a filtered JSON export of airline crew friends. The task requires adding exactly two friends: 'Captain UAL' from United Airlines (who must be included in the output) and 'Captain DAL' from Delta Airlines (who must be excluded from the output). The filtered output must be saved to /sdcard/united_friends.json as a JSON array containing objects with 'name' and 'airline' fields. The verifier confirms file creation, validates JSON structure, checks inclusion/exclusion of the two required friends, and uses VLM analysis to verify UI interaction.
